description_long: This is an outdoor performance stage with a pitched white canopy roof supported by a metallic truss frame. The stage platform is elevated and features several musical instruments, including guitars, a keyboard, and a drum set, as well as life-sized human figures posed as musicians. Large speaker arrays are mounted on both sides of the stage, with colorful light effects or confetti elements cascading down from the truss. The rear of the stage displays a large promotional banner with a prominent image and text. The stage is equipped with multiple microphones and stands, and there is a small control booth or DJ station on one side.
description: An outdoor performance stage with a white canopy, truss frame, musical instruments, speakers, and a large promotional banner.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full stage setup, canopy, musical instruments, microphones, and speaker arrays with colorful effects.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the musicians, instruments, and the control booth area on the left side of the stage.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the large promotional banner, the back of the musicians, and the truss structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the musicians, instruments, and the right-side speaker array with colorful effects.
